name: Okta API Token Revoked (30 days)
description: Detects successful API token revocation events in Okta system logs, useful for tracking sensitive credential lifecycle changes.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS actor_name, l.target_id AS token_id, l.target_type, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) = 'system.api_token.revoke' AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.outcome, 'success')) IN ('success', 'allow', 'allowed') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Confirm token revocations were expected and investigate abrupt or unusual token churn by privileged identities.
